title: Better Mace
description: A mace worthy of its strength... not a toy.
body:
# THE MACE
**Let’s be honest: the vanila mace texture looks like a kid’s toy and doesn’t do justice to its true power.**
That’s why I decided to create a 3D battlehammer version. Especially because I believe that special weapons in Minecraft should have 3D textures, just like the trident already does.

Enjoy the texture pack!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zrfBLCYKzb0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

If you have any issues or feedback, feel free to message me on Discord — my username is **heylado**.
